  • Data Structures

  • Examples
  • Data Structures
  • Data Fields

Data Structures

Here are the data structures with brief descriptions:
bme_extra_file_infoInformation for extra files in the system
bme_free_mem_infoInformation for the free memory in the system
bme_global_info_tGlobal information, passed to each tile
bme_io_dev_infoInformation for a particular I/O device
bme_local_info_tLocal information, passed to each tile on its stack
bme_mem_seg_infoMapping information for a segment of memory
bme_memory_attrStructure to describe caching attributes of mapped memory
bme_phys_mem_descDescriptor for physical memory attributes
bme_phys_mem_desc_ioStruct to lock and describe user memory
bme_saved_regsCaller-saved registers from the thread of execution that incurred an interrupt
bme_saved_regs_fullAll registers from the thread of execution that incurred an interrupt
bme_tile_info_tInformation for a particular tile
bme_user_mem_descDescriptor for user memory attributes
bme_user_mem_desc_ioDescribes pages underlying user memory
pos_tType for tile coordinates; matches that used by hardware in most contexts, such as when sending an IDN or UDN message
tmc_spin_barrier_tA shared memory, spin-based barrier structure
tmc_spin_cond_tA shared memory, spin-based condition variable
tmc_spin_mutex_tA shared memory spinlock data structure
tmc_spin_queued_mutex_tA shared memory, spinning, fair mutex
tmc_spin_rwlock_tA shared memory reader/writer spinlock data structure
tte_tThe full data translation table entry
